title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down Alex Hormozi's AI business system using four pillars: data as competitive advantage, voice-first design, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. Marchese highlights a critical mistake Hormozi's teams were making that required executive intervention.
